staging_sql: INSERT INTO stg_customer (customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active) SELECT (payload->>'customer_id')::bigint,payload->>'customer_name',payload->>'email',payload->>'phone',payload->>'city',payload->>'region',payload->>'customer_segment',(payload->>'signup_date')::date,(payload->>'is_active')::boolean FROM load_customer_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_brand (brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active) SELECT (payload->>'brand_id')::bigint,payload->>'brand_name',payload->>'country_of_origin',payload->>'brand_tier',(payload->>'is_active')::boolean FROM load_brand_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_collection (collection_id,brand_id,collection_name,launch_year,collection_status) SELECT (payload->>'collection_id')::bigint,(payload->>'brand_id')::bigint,payload->>'collection_name',(payload->>'launch_year')::smallint,payload->>'collection_status' FROM load_collection_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_watch_product (product_id,brand_id,collection_id,sku,product_name,watch_category,gender_category,movement_type,strap_material,dial_color,case_size_mm,water_resistance_metres,unit_price,warranty_months,product_status) SELECT (payload->>'product_id')::bigint,(payload->>'brand_id')::bigint,(payload->>'collection_id')::bigint,payload->>'sku',payload->>'product_name',payload->>'watch_category',payload->>'gender_category',payload->>'movement_type',payload->>'strap_material',payload->>'dial_color',(payload->>'case_size_mm')::numeric(5,2),(payload->>'water_resistance_metres')::integer,(payload->>'unit_price')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'warranty_months')::integer,payload->>'product_status' FROM load_watch_product_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_warehouse (warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active) SELECT (payload->>'warehouse_id')::bigint,payload->>'warehouse_name',payload->>'city',payload->>'region',payload->>'warehouse_type',(payload->>'is_active')::boolean FROM load_warehouse_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_inventory (inventory_id,product_id,warehouse_id,inventory_date,on_hand_quantity,reserved_quantity,available_quantity,reorder_level,inventory_status) SELECT (payload->>'inventory_id')::bigint,(payload->>'product_id')::bigint,(payload->>'warehouse_id')::bigint,(payload->>'inventory_date')::date,(payload->>'on_hand_quantity')::integer,(payload->>'reserved_quantity')::integer,(payload->>'available_quantity')::integer,(payload->>'reorder_level')::integer,payload->>'inventory_status' FROM load_inventory_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_order (order_id,customer_id,order_date,order_status,order_channel,gross_order_amount,discount_amount,net_order_amount) SELECT (payload->>'order_id')::bigint,(payload->>'customer_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_date')::date,payload->>'order_status',payload->>'order_channel',(payload->>'gross_order_amount')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'discount_amount')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'net_order_amount')::numeric(14,2) FROM load_order_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_order_item (order_item_id,order_id,product_id,warehouse_id,quantity,unit_price,gross_line_amount,line_discount_amount,line_net_amount) SELECT (payload->>'order_item_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_id')::bigint,(payload->>'product_id')::bigint,(payload->>'warehouse_id')::bigint,(payload->>'quantity')::integer,(payload->>'unit_price')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'gross_line_amount')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'line_discount_amount')::numeric(14,2),(payload->>'line_net_amount')::numeric(14,2) FROM load_order_item_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_payment (payment_id,order_id,payment_date,payment_method,payment_transaction_type,payment_status,payment_amount,transaction_reference) SELECT (payload->>'payment_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_id')::bigint,(payload->>'payment_date')::date,payload->>'payment_method',payload->>'payment_transaction_type',payload->>'payment_status',(payload->>'payment_amount')::numeric(14,2),payload->>'transaction_reference' FROM load_payment_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_shipment (shipment_id,order_id,warehouse_id,tracking_number,courier_partner,shipment_date,promised_delivery_date,actual_delivery_date,shipment_status,delivery_delay_days) SELECT (payload->>'shipment_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_id')::bigint,(payload->>'warehouse_id')::bigint,payload->>'tracking_number',payload->>'courier_partner',(payload->>'shipment_date')::date,(payload->>'promised_delivery_date')::date,(payload->>'actual_delivery_date')::date,payload->>'shipment_status',(payload->>'delivery_delay_days')::integer FROM load_shipment_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_return_request (return_id,order_item_id,return_quantity,return_reason,return_status,requested_date,approved_date,refund_date,refund_amount) SELECT (payload->>'return_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_item_id')::bigint,(payload->>'return_quantity')::integer,payload->>'return_reason',payload->>'return_status',(payload->>'requested_date')::date,(payload->>'approved_date')::date,(payload->>'refund_date')::date,(payload->>'refund_amount')::numeric(14,2) FROM load_return_request_raw;

INSERT INTO stg_warranty_claim (warranty_claim_id,order_item_id,claim_reason,claim_status,claim_date,service_start_date,service_completion_date,service_cost_amount,resolution_description) SELECT (payload->>'warranty_claim_id')::bigint,(payload->>'order_item_id')::bigint,payload->>'claim_reason',payload->>'claim_status',(payload->>'claim_date')::date,(payload->>'service_start_date')::date,(payload->>'service_completion_date')::date,(payload->>'service_cost_amount')::numeric(14,2),payload->>'resolution_description' FROM load_warranty_claim_raw;
dimension_sql: WITH dates(full_date) AS (VALUES (DATE '2026-06-01'),(DATE '2026-06-08'),(DATE '2026-06-15'),(DATE '2026-06-22'),(DATE '2026-06-29'),(DATE '2026-07-10')) INSERT INTO dim_date (date_key,full_date,day_of_week,day_name,week_of_year,month_number,month_name,quarter_number,calendar_year,is_weekend) SELECT to_char(full_date,'YYYYMMDD')::integer,full_date,extract(isodow FROM full_date)::smallint,trim(to_char(full_date,'Day')),extract(week FROM full_date)::smallint,extract(month FROM full_date)::smallint,trim(to_char(full_date,'Month')),extract(quarter FROM full_date)::smallint,extract(year FROM full_date)::smallint,(extract(isodow FROM full_date) IN (6,7)) FROM dates;

INSERT INTO dim_customer (customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active) SELECT customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active FROM stg_customer;
INSERT INTO dim_brand (brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active) SELECT brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active FROM stg_brand;

INSERT INTO dim_collection (collection_id,brand_key,collection_name,launch_year,collection_status) SELECT c.collection_id,b.brand_key,c.collection_name,c.launch_year,c.collection_status FROM stg_collection c JOIN dim_brand b ON b.brand_id=c.brand_id;

INSERT INTO dim_product (product_id,brand_key,collection_key,sku,product_name,watch_category,gender_category,movement_type,strap_material,dial_color,case_size_mm,water_resistance_metres,catalogue_unit_price,warranty_months,product_status) SELECT p.product_id,b.brand_key,c.collection_key,p.sku,p.product_name,p.watch_category,p.gender_category,p.movement_type,p.strap_material,p.dial_color,p.case_size_mm,p.water_resistance_metres,p.unit_price,p.warranty_months,p.product_status FROM stg_watch_product p JOIN dim_brand b ON b.brand_id=p.brand_id JOIN dim_collection c ON c.collection_id=p.collection_id;
INSERT INTO dim_warehouse (warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active) SELECT warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active FROM stg_warehouse;

INSERT INTO dim_order (order_id,customer_key,order_date_key,order_status,order_channel,gross_order_amount,discount_amount,net_order_amount) SELECT o.order_id,c.customer_key,d.date_key,o.order_status,o.order_channel,o.gross_order_amount,o.discount_amount,o.net_order_amount FROM stg_order o JOIN dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id JOIN dim_date d ON d.full_date=o.order_date;
fact_sql: INSERT INTO fact_sales (order_item_id,order_key,customer_key,product_key,warehouse_key,order_date_key,quantity,unit_price,gross_line_amount,line_discount_amount,line_net_amount) SELECT i.order_item_id,o.order_key,o.customer_key,p.product_key,w.warehouse_key,o.order_date_key,i.quantity,i.unit_price,i.gross_line_amount,i.line_discount_amount,i.line_net_amount FROM stg_order_item i JOIN dim_order o ON o.order_id=i.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id JOIN dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=i.warehouse_id WHERE i.order_item_id IN (7011,7021,7031,7041,7051,7061,7071,7081,7091,7101);

INSERT INTO fact_inventory (inventory_id,product_key,warehouse_key,inventory_date_key,on_hand_quantity,reserved_quantity,available_quantity,reorder_level,inventory_status) SELECT i.inventory_id,p.product_key,w.warehouse_key,d.date_key,i.on_hand_quantity,i.reserved_quantity,i.available_quantity,i.reorder_level,i.inventory_status FROM stg_inventory i JOIN dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id JOIN dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=i.warehouse_id JOIN dim_date d ON d.full_date=i.inventory_date;

INSERT INTO fact_payment (payment_id,order_key,customer_key,payment_date_key,payment_method,payment_transaction_type,payment_status,payment_amount,transaction_reference) SELECT p.payment_id,o.order_key,o.customer_key,d.date_key,p.payment_method,p.payment_transaction_type,p.payment_status,p.payment_amount,p.transaction_reference FROM stg_payment p JOIN dim_order o ON o.order_id=p.order_id JOIN dim_date d ON d.full_date=p.payment_date;

INSERT INTO fact_delivery (shipment_id,order_key,customer_key,warehouse_key,shipment_date_key,promised_delivery_date_key,actual_delivery_date_key,tracking_number,courier_partner,shipment_status,shipment_count,delivered_count,delayed_count,delivery_delay_days) SELECT s.shipment_id,o.order_key,o.customer_key,w.warehouse_key,sd.date_key,pd.date_key,ad.date_key,s.tracking_number,s.courier_partner,s.shipment_status,1::smallint,(CASE WHEN s.shipment_status='DELIVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::smallint,(CASE WHEN s.delivery_delay_days>0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::smallint,s.delivery_delay_days FROM stg_shipment s JOIN dim_order o ON o.order_id=s.order_id JOIN dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=s.warehouse_id JOIN dim_date sd ON sd.full_date=s.shipment_date JOIN dim_date pd ON pd.full_date=s.promised_delivery_date LEFT JOIN dim_date ad ON ad.full_date=s.actual_delivery_date;

INSERT INTO fact_return (return_id,sales_key,order_key,customer_key,product_key,requested_date_key,approved_date_key,refund_date_key,return_reason,return_status,return_quantity,refund_amount) SELECT r.return_id,fs.sales_key,fs.order_key,fs.customer_key,fs.product_key,rd.date_key,ad.date_key,fd.date_key,r.return_reason,r.return_status,r.return_quantity,r.refund_amount FROM stg_return_request r JOIN fact_sales fs ON fs.order_item_id=r.order_item_id JOIN dim_date rd ON rd.full_date=r.requested_date LEFT JOIN dim_date ad ON ad.full_date=r.approved_date LEFT JOIN dim_date fd ON fd.full_date=r.refund_date;

INSERT INTO fact_claim (warranty_claim_id,sales_key,order_key,customer_key,product_key,claim_date_key,service_start_date_key,service_completion_date_key,claim_reason,claim_status,service_cost_amount,resolution_days,resolution_description) SELECT c.warranty_claim_id,fs.sales_key,fs.order_key,fs.customer_key,fs.product_key,cd.date_key,sd.date_key,ed.date_key,c.claim_reason,c.claim_status,c.service_cost_amount,CASE WHEN c.service_completion_date IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE (c.service_completion_date-c.claim_date) END,c.resolution_description FROM stg_warranty_claim c JOIN fact_sales fs ON fs.order_item_id=c.order_item_id JOIN dim_date cd ON cd.full_date=c.claim_date LEFT JOIN dim_date sd ON sd.full_date=c.service_start_date LEFT JOIN dim_date ed ON ed.full_date=c.service_completion_date;
assumptions: All records are fictional synthetic demonstration data.
Raw identity load_id values are omitted so PostgreSQL generates them.
The six required dim_date rows cover every date referenced by dimensions and facts while spanning 40 calendar days inclusively.

Fact sales uses one designated representative order item per order to satisfy the specified 10-row fact_sales target; all 30 order-item rows remain available in staging and all order totals reconcile to them.
Each generated return and warranty claim references a delivered order's designated fact-sales item so required fact foreign keys resolve.
The mandated profile requires ten return rows and ten warranty-claim rows despite the narrative preference that these events be minorities; exact requested table counts take precedence.
Successful payment amounts equal their associated order net amounts and do not exceed them.
